title: Transcontinental Inc. – Release of Second Quarter 2026 Results and Conference Call
author: Na
description: TC Transcontinental will release its second quarter 2026 financial results on June 3, 2026, followed by a conference call on June 4, 2026. The company also announced the nationwide expansion of raddar, a Canadian mass-media platform, and multi-year partnership agreements with Postmedia and Glacier through 2030.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Glacier has signed a multi-year agreement with TC Transcontinental through 2030, indicating a strategic partnership extension and business commitment.

title: Glacier Bancorp, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call
author: Na
description: Glacier Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: GBCI) announced it will report first quarter 2026 financial results on April 23, 2026, with a conference call scheduled for April 24, 2026. The company's Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.33 per share. Additionally, CFO Ron Copher announced his intention to retire after 20 years with the company.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article contains routine corporate announcements including earnings reporting, dividend declaration, and executive transition. While dividend maintenance is typically positive, the CFO retirement after 20 years could signal leadership transition uncertainty. Overall, these are standard corporate actions without clear positive or negative implications for near-term performance.

title: Glacier Bancorp, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend
author: Globe Newswire
description: Glacier Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: GBCI) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.33 per share, payable on April 16, 2026, to shareholders of record on April 7, 2026. The company has maintained 164 consecutive quarterly dividends and increased its dividend 49 times, demonstrating a strong commitment to shareholder returns.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a quarterly dividend and has a strong track record of 164 consecutive quarterly dividends with 49 dividend increases, indicating financial stability, profitability, and management confidence in future earnings. This is a positive signal for investors seeking income and demonstrates the company's commitment to returning capital to shareholders.

title: Glacier Bancorp, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend
author: Globe Newswire
description: Glacier Bancorp's Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.33 per share, payable on December 18, 2025, to shareholders of record on December 9, 2025. This marks their 163rd consecutive quarterly dividend and 49th dividend increase.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Consistent dividend payment history with 163 consecutive quarterly dividends and 49 dividend increases demonstrates financial stability and commitment to shareholders

title: Glacier Bancorp, Inc. Announces Third Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call
author: Randall M. Chesler, Ceo
description: Glacier Bancorp will report third quarter financial results on October 16, 2025, with a conference call for investors scheduled for October 17, 2025. The company provides details on accessing the conference call and webcast.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Standard quarterly financial reporting with no explicit positive or negative performance indicators in the main announcement
